# NEX SDK

A lightweight, framework-independent, performance-optimized Web Component developer toolkit designed with a gorgeous neon cyberpunk aesthetic. Natively encapsulated using Shadow DOM and optimized for static hosting and jsDelivr CDN delivery.

> Information for AI coding assistants and LLMs integrating NEX SDK.

## Core Reference
- [Main Integration Guide](README.md) - Master documentation containing API Reference, usage examples, best practices, and CDN installation guides.

## Component Documentation
- [nex-stream](packages/nex-stream/README.md) - HLS/MP4/WebM Cyber Video Player. Includes custom controls overlay, volume, fullscreen, double click triggers, and telemetry hooks.
- [nex-image](packages/nex-image/README.md) - Lazy-loading Responsive Image. Includes IntersectionObserver lazy triggers, shimmer loader animations, and automatic HTTP error fallbacks.
- [nex-file](packages/nex-file/README.md) - Video/Image/PDF Card Previewer. Handles dynamic mime-type formatting, size labels calculation, and download payloads.
- [nex-upload](packages/nex-upload/README.md) - Drag & Drop File Uplink Portal. Features multi-file selection queue, size/type validation filters, and XHR upload progress indicators.
- [nex-ui](packages/nex-ui/README.md) - Interactive Elements Bundle. Registers `<nex-button>`, `<nex-card>`, `<nex-loader>`, `<nex-modal>`, and `<nex-toast>`.
- [nex-analytics](packages/nex-analytics/README.md) - Page View & Component Telemetry Client. Logs page views, popstate SPA routing transitions, and Shadow DOM custom events.
- [nex-terminal](packages/nex-terminal/README.md) - Interactive Scrolling Cyberpunk Terminal Shell. Supports mock CLI commands and history tracking.
- [nex-chart](packages/nex-chart/README.md) - Neon Glowing Canvas-based Telemetry Line/Bar Chart visualizer.
- [nex-router](packages/nex-router/README.md) - Glitch animated tab navigation router with automated page views toggle support.

## CDN Releases (v1.1.0)
- **`<nex-stream>`**: `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/abhinavgautam08/nex-sdk@v1.1.0/packages/nex-stream/nex-stream.min.js`
- **`<nex-image>`**: `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/abhinavgautam08/nex-sdk@v1.1.0/packages/nex-image/nex-image.min.js`
- **`<nex-file>`**: `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/abhinavgautam08/nex-sdk@v1.1.0/packages/nex-file/nex-file.min.js`
- **`<nex-upload>`**: `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/abhinavgautam08/nex-sdk@v1.1.0/packages/nex-upload/nex-upload.min.js`
- **`<nex-ui>`**: `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/abhinavgautam08/nex-sdk@v1.1.0/packages/nex-ui/nex-ui.min.js`
- **`NexAnalytics`**: `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/abhinavgautam08/nex-sdk@v1.1.0/packages/nex-analytics/nex-analytics.min.js`
- **`<nex-terminal>`**: `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/abhinavgautam08/nex-sdk@v1.1.0/packages/nex-terminal/nex-terminal.min.js`
- **`<nex-chart>`**: `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/abhinavgautam08/nex-sdk@v1.1.0/packages/nex-chart/nex-chart.min.js`
- **`<nex-router>`**: `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/abhinavgautam08/nex-sdk@v1.1.0/packages/nex-router/nex-router.min.js`
